basics.name: Shubham Shrivastava
basics.label: Product Management Professional
basics.summary: Results-driven product management professional with over 4 years of experience in software development, product lifecycle management, and strategic data analysis.
Expert in crafting and executing product roadmaps, translating complex requirements into actionable features, and optimizing cross-functional team collaboration.
Proven ability to leverage data insights for scalable, user-centric solutions that align with business objectives, driving significant improvements in product performance and user engagement.
Demonstrated success in managing high-impact projects and delivering robust, market-ready products.

education.institution: Rajiv Gandhi Proudyogiki Vishwavidyalaya, M.P., India

highlights: Developed a machine learning recommendation engine for Netflix, optimizing ad targeting.
Led Agile sprints, managed Power BI dashboards, and shaped the go-to-market strategy by integrating user feedback.
Architected a product roadmap ensuring 99.9% data synchronization uptime.
Led market research, launched key features, and leveraged Google Cloud for optimized data processing.

work.company: Department of Financial Services, Oakland University
highlights: Drove a 20% user engagement increase by delivering an optimized MVP.
Managed a $200,000 budget and mentored junior team members while aligning product improvements with user feedback.
Led MVP development, increasing daily users by 15%.
Enhanced customer experience through real-time vendor tracking and used Figma for prototyping to streamline design processes.
Developed scalable J2EE applications and implemented REST APIs with Spring Boot.
Improved code quality using test-driven development and tools like JUnit and Mockito.
